raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fazzija: Atdarr Loh-
gu prett Rihteem/ un wiꞥſch at-
darrija to. Un Elisus fazzija:
Schauji/ un wiꞥſch ſchahwe:
Tad tazzija wiꞥſch: Ta irr wee-
na Butta ta KUNGA Pesti-
tchanas/ un weena Pestifchanas
Bulta prett teem Sihrexeem/ jo
tu kaufi tohs Sihrexus Alvekâ/
teekams tu tohs tsdeldest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz fazzija wiꞥſch:
Neimn tahs Bultas/ un kad
wiꞥſch tahs nehme/ tad fazzija
wiꞥſch us Israëta Kehninu:
Sitt to Semmi/ un wiꞥſch fit-
te trihs Reisi/ un pehz ſtahwe-
ja wiꞥſch kluffu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad apskuitahs tas Dee-
wa Wihrs pahr to/ un fazzija:
Buhtu tu peezaß jeb ſefchas Rei-
ses fittis/ tad buhtu tu tohs
Sihrexus ta kawis/ teekams tee
isdeldetti ktuiſchi/ bet nu kaufi
tu tohs Sihrexus trihſkahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Elisus bija no-
mirris/un aprakts bija/ tad ee-
lausahs to Moabiteru Sirrotaji
paſchâ Gadda Eṣahkumâ eekſch
Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee weenu Wiḣ-
ru aprakke/ raugi/ tad redseja
tee weenu Sirrotaju Pulku/ un
mette to Wihrn Elisus Kappâ.
Un kad tas Wihrs tur nahze/ un
Elisus Kaalus aiskahre/ tad tap-
pe tas dsihws/ un zehlahs ſtah-
wu us ſawahm Kahjahin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Asaëls tas Sihreex
Kehniach ſpaidija Israëlu/ wiſ-
fä Joaïfa Muhschâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas KUNGS bija
teem ſchebligs/ un apscheblojahs
pahr teem/ un atgreesahs pee
teem ſawas Derribas deht ar
Ahbräämu/ Jhsääku un Jehka-
bu/ un ne gribbeja tohs nomai-
taht/ ne atmette tohs arridsan
no tawa Waiga/ lihds ſchim Lai-
tain.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Asaëls tas Sihreex
Kehniach nomirre/ un Ben-A-
dads winna Dehls tappe par
Kehninu winna Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Joas Joaïfa Dehls
greesahs atpakkat/ un uſneſme
tohs Pilssahtus no Ben-Adada
Asaëta Dehla Rohkas/ ko wiꞥſch
no Joaïfa ſawva Tehwa Rohkas
Karrâ bij nehmis/ Joas kawe
winnu trihs Reisi/ un atdabbn-
ja tohs Israëta Pilssahtus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XIV. Nodalla.
Amazlius tohp par Kehninu Jerasalemē: r.
Nokauj tohs/ kas winna Tehwu nokawn-
schi: r. Karrâ un uſwarr prett teem Eedo-
mitereem: 7. Eṣahk arri Karru ar Joasu/
kur ne waijaga: 8. Kurrâ wiꞥſch tohp ſa-
guhſſihts: 12. Un Lakijâ no ſaweem pa-
ſcheem Faudim nokants: 19. Un winna
Dehls Asarijuē tohp par Kehninu: 21. Je-
robeams tas ohts ſcha Wahrda walda pahr
Israëlu: 23. Mirſt/ un pamett ſawam
Deblam Sakarijum to Walſibn: 29.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Htrâ Gaddâ Joafa
Joäifa Debla ta Isra-
eta Kehnika/ tappe A-
mazius Joafa ta Kehnika no
Juha Dehls par Kehninu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Diwidefinits un peezus
Gaddus wezz bija wiꞥſch/ kad
wiꞥſch par Kehninu tappe/ un
waldia diwidefinits un dewinus
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
